resources.string: Add the \"Power Menu\" tile to your Quick Settings panel for instant one-tap access.
Allows the app to open the system Power Menu when you tap the Quick Settings tile. This is useful when the physical power button is broken. No personal data is collected.
You\'re all set! Tap the button below or use the Quick Settings tile to access the Power Menu.
Enable the Accessibility Service to allow PowerTile to open the system Power Menu on your behalf.
How to add the Quick Settings tile
Swipe down twice from the top
